goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the 'east'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet' and 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '11:30'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the east
The hotel should have a star of 4
Make sure you get whether they have internet and phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 11:30
Make sure you get contact number and car type
